title: 2 SKT EU Travel EXT Lead + 2 X USB (A+C)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: POWER WHERE YOU NEED IT: The Masterplug EU travel kit allows you to power and charge devices via UK sockets and fast charging USB A + C ports simultaneously throughout Europe. Take it with you on business trips, to hotels, airports, or public spaces

MULTI-PURPOSE AND SAFE: 20W fast charging USB A and C ports let you power and charge your devices without using valuable socket space. Built-in protection ensures safety from overcurrent, overcharging, overheating, and short-circuiting

COMPACT DESIGN: The 45cm cable ensures that the kit is safe to use where space is at a premium. Use it on top of hotel or student desks or kitchen countertops, under bedside and office tables, or anywhere a longer cable might prove a tripping hazard

GOES WHERE YOU GO: Perfect for domestic business trips, cruises and weekend breaks, the cable can be packed into the included travel case, secured with a Velcro tie. The case can then fit neatly into bags or hand luggage, or stored in the back of a car
MASTERPLUG'S 1 YEAR MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: As well as offering a one-year warranty, Luceco have a dedicated technical support team, who are there to help you
description: The Masterplug UK to Europe travel extension lead lets you power and charge two appliances and two USB devices simultaneously. The double travel adaptor with EU plug is ideal for hotels and airports.

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Cruise Ship Approved, Lightweight, Usb Slot
